android.widget.TextView.text:
The development server returned response error code: 500
URL: http://10.0.2.2:8082/.expo/.virtual-metro-entry.bundle?platform=android&dev=true&lazy=true&minify=false&app=com.ledbillboard.marketplace&modulesOnly=false&runModule=true

android.widget.TextView.heading: false
